raw_consumer_statement: I have a bestbuy citi bank credit card. Recently my statement and online account management site indicated there had been a purchase on XX/XX/XXXX, with a promotional balance deferred interest until 2028. I did not make a purchase. The details of the purchase say it was a " Mortgage Payment '' charge. This is a bestbuy credit card, not possible to make a mortgage payment charge. The online system does not allow for disputing this and the online support refuses to help deal with the issue and forces a phone call to a support team that can not answer the question of what this is, how a store card has the ability to be used for a mortgage payment somehow, etc. This seems to indicate citibank is doing something fraudulent potentially on many peoples accounts and is trying to hide their practice. They are forcing a phone call only, not handling online, and are not providing XXXX compliant alternate forms of communication.
